mapper.sql: id, project_name, customer, contract_number, description, start_date, end_date, contract_value, planned_cost, actual_cost, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM project_info ORDER BY project_name
SELECT FROM project_info WHERE LOWER(project_name) = LOWER(#{projectName})
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM project_info WHERE LOWER(project_name) = LOWER(#{projectName})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO project_info (project_name, customer, contract_number, description, start_date, end_date, contract_value, planned_cost, actual_cost) VALUES (#{projectName}, #{customer}, #{contractNumber}, #{description}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{contractValue}, #{plannedCost}, #{actualCost})
mapper.update: UPDATE project_info SET project_name = #{projectName}, customer = #{customer}, contract_number = #{contractNumber}, description = #{description}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, contract_value = #{contractValue}, planned_cost = #{plannedCost}, actual_cost = #{actualCost}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
